ops.title: Auto-push refs/cc-notes/*: structured-matcher pack hooks, SessionEnd backstop, bootstrap migration, fleet self-heal + release

ops.text: turn-level auto_sync fires on jj commit/describe, git/jj push, ccx vcs ship, and all cc-notes CLI/MCP writes (once per turn)
SessionEnd handler pushes dirty refs via zero-network tracking-ref comparison; silent best-effort
ensure-cc-notes.sh migrated to pack bootstrap.py; plugin.json hooks block removed
heal_event_wiring regenerates missing capt-hook run <Event> wiring from UserPromptSubmit
captain-hook settings_drift masking fixed upstream with regression test
released via tag; consumer repo verified end-to-end (note written, session exit, ref on remote)
